requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 EV Supply Equipment Safety Baseline
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851 电动汽车供电设备安全基线
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851 電動汽車供電設備安全基線

summary.en: IEC 61851-1:2017 covers EV supply equipment for charging electric road vehicles up to 1,000 V AC or 1,500 V DC and includes EVSE characteristics, EVSE-to-EV connection specifications, and electrical safety requirements. In Kenya, this IEC evidence is best treated as an accepted-standard or project requirement unless KEBS, the PVoC agent, the buyer, or the project specification calls it up for the exact product.
summary.zh: IEC 61851-1:2017 适用于额定供电电压最高 1,000 V AC 或 1,500 V DC 的电动道路车辆充电供电设备，并涵盖供电设备特性、供电设备与车辆连接规范以及电气安全要求。在肯尼亚，除非 KEBS、PVoC 机构、买方或项目规格对具体产品引用该标准，否则应将其作为被接受标准或项目要求处理。
summary.zht: IEC 61851-1:2017 適用於額定供電電壓最高 1,000 V AC 或 1,500 V DC 的電動道路車輛充電供電設備，並涵蓋供電設備特性、供電設備與車輛連接規範以及電氣安全要求。在肯亞，除非 KEBS、PVoC 機構、買方或項目規格對具體產品引用該標準，否則應將其作為被接受標準或項目要求處理。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-21-2 for off-board EV charging-system EMC where requested
IEC 61851-23 / IEC 61851-24 for DC charging where requested

summary.en: China's comparable conductive-charging-system baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, with related China evidence often covering charger modes, protection, control pilot logic, marking, and installation instructions. It should be clause-mapped against the requested IEC 61851 edition and any Kenyan accepted specification.
summary.zh: 中国相近的传导充电系统基线为 GB/T 18487.1-2023，相关中国证据通常覆盖充电模式、保护、控制导引逻辑、标识和安装说明。应将其逐条映射至被要求的 IEC 61851 版本及任何肯尼亚认可规格。
summary.zht: 中國相近的傳導充電系統基線為 GB/T 18487.1-2023，相關中國證據通常覆蓋充電模式、保護、控制導引邏輯、標識和安裝說明。應將其逐條映射至被要求的 IEC 61851 版本及任何肯亞認可規格。

gap.en: Prepare a clause matrix from GB/T 18487 evidence to IEC 61851, identify the exact edition and parts required, and check residual gaps such as RCD / residual-current protection, automatic reclosing, temperature ratings, marking, manuals, EMC reports, DC communication, and accredited laboratory scope.
gap.zh: 应准备从 GB/T 18487 证据到 IEC 61851 的条款矩阵，识别所需具体版本和分部分，并核查剩余差距，例如剩余电流保护、自动重合闸、温度额定值、标识、说明书、EMC报告、直流通信以及实验室认可范围。
gap.zht: 應準備從 GB/T 18487 證據到 IEC 61851 的條款矩陣，識別所需具體版本和分部分，並核查剩餘差距，例如剩餘電流保護、自動重合閘、溫度額定值、標識、說明書、EMC報告、直流通信以及實驗室認可範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only where KEBS, a Kenyan Standard, approved specification, PVoC route, project owner, tender, utility, insurer, or buyer requires IEC 61851 evidence
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 evidence is a China technical baseline and does not by itself prove IEC 61851 conformity

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 61851 is the key international EVSE safety reference, but Kenyan use depends on the accepted specification or project route confirmed for the exact charger.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 61851 是关键的国际EVSE安全参考，但在肯尼亚是否适用取决于针对具体充电桩确认的认可规格或项目路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 61851 是關鍵的國際EVSE安全參考，但在肯亞是否適用取決於針對具體充電樁確認的認可規格或項目路徑。
